lt.line: Jis nenulauš palūžusios nendrės ir neužgesins gruzdančio dagčio, kol neatneš teisybei laimėjimo; o jo vardas teiks viltį tautoms!

en.event: Saturday of the Fifteenth Week in Ordinary Time
en.line: And in his name the Gentiles will hope.
Whoever has ears ought to hear.

lt.line: Pietų karalienė teismo dieną prisikels drauge su šia karta ir ją pasmerks, ji ėjo iš žemės pakraščių klausytis Saliamono išminties, o štai čia daugiau, negu Saliamonas“.

en.event: Monday of the Sixteenth Week in Ordinary Time
en.line: At the judgment the queen of the south will arise with this generation and condemn it, because she came from the ends of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon; and there is somet

lt.line: Kiekvienas, kas tik vykdo mano dangiškojo Tėvo valią, yra man ir brolis, ir sesuo, ir motina“.

en.event: Tuesday of the Sixteenth Week in Ordinary Time
en.line: For whoever does the will of my heavenly Father is my brother, and sister, and mother.

lt.line: Marija Magdalietė nuėjo ir pranešė mokiniams, kad mačiusi Viešpatį ir ką jis jai sakęs.

en.line: But go to my brothers and tell them, 'I am going to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God.'" Mary Magdalene went and announced to the disciples, "I have seen the Lord,"

lt.line: Tuo bus pašlovintas mano Tėvas, kad jūs duosite gausių vaisių ir būsite mano mokiniai“.

en.event: Thursday of the Sixteenth Week in Ordinary Time
en.line: Amen, I say to you, many prophets and righteous people longed to see what you see but did not see it, and to hear what you hear but did not hear it.

lt.line: Pasėlys geroje žemėje – tasai, kuris girdi ir supranta žodį; tas ir duoda derlių: kas šimteriopą, kas šešiasdešimteriopą, o kas trisdešimteriopą“.

en.event: Friday of the Sixteenth Week in Ordinary Time
en.line: But the seed sown on rich soil is the one who hears the word and understands it, who indeed bears fruit and yields a hundred or sixty or thirtyfold.
